fundamentals.name: Reddit, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Reddit, Inc. operates a digital community in the United States and internationally. The company's platform enables user to engage in conversations, explore passions, research new hobbies, exchange goods and services, create new communities and experiences, share laughs, and find belonging. It also organizes communities based on specific interests that enable users to engage in conversations by sharing experiences, submitting links, uploading images and videos, and replying to one another. Reddit, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable company with strong margins and a solid balance sheet, trading at a reasonable forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates significantly with EPS of 1.01 vs 0.56; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 69.1% YoY, with analyst estimates for current Q and FY also strong.
Exceptional earnings growth of 675.0% YoY and quarterly earnings growth of 679.8%.
High gross margin of 91.4%, operating margin of 27.6%, and profit margin of 28.6%.
Strong return on equity at 26.2% and return on assets at 13.1%.
Healthy balance sheet with a current ratio of 12.73 and quick ratio of 12.39, and ample cash ($2.77B) relative to debt ($21.29M).
Forward P/E of 17.53 is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 44.23, indicating attractive valuation relative to future growth.
negatives: Price/Sales (TTM) of 12.05 is on the higher side, though supported by growth.
Beta of 1.85 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.
The recent pullback and conflicting fair value signals suggest potential short-term price uncertainty.

news.paragraph: Reddit's stock has experienced a pullback, with recent articles highlighting both concerns about Meta's forum launch and underappreciated ARPU growth. While some analysis suggests fears are overextended, others point to conflicting fair value signals and a recent nosedive in share price. The company's growth story remains in focus amid these mixed signals.

headlines.title: Reddit: Meta Forum Fears Overextended, ARPU Growth Remains Underappreciated (NYSE:RDDT)
Reddit (RDDT) Valuation Check After Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
Meta Forum Launch Puts Fresh Spotlight On Reddit’s Growth Story
